title: Did Trump reject Putin's Iran deal to end war? What was the offer
summary_full: Russia's Vladimir Putin reportedly proposed Russia take custody of Iran's enriched uranium to end the ongoing war, a deal Donald Trump declined. This offer comes as the US and Israel seek to secure Iran's nuclear stockpile, with options ranging from voluntary surrender to potential special forces intervention. Trump, however, downplayed the immediate focus on the uranium.
